title: Workhorse Group (WKHS) Reports Q2 Loss, Lags Revenue Estimates
text: Workhorse Group reported Q2 2024 earnings with a quarterly loss of $1.40 per share in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate, compared to a loss of $2.40 per share a year ago. The company posted revenues of $0.84 million for the quarter ended June 2024, significantly missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 71.93%, compared to year-ago revenues of $3.97 million. The dramatic revenue decline reflects the company's manufacturing and delivery challenges during the period. Despite the revenue miss, the loss per share performance aligned with consensus expectations, suggesting improved operational efficiency on a per-share basis.
